series_metadata.series_title: Long Term Care Loan (LTCL) Program Application
series_metadata.series_description: Employers in the healthcare field seek reimbursement from BWC by submitting the LTCL program application. Ohio nursing homes and hospitals apply for reimbursement of interest paid on loans used to purchase safety equipment to reduce workplace injuries resulting from manually lifting patients

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: a total of . This includes 15 years as required by ORC 2305.06 5 year life of agreement
